name: North Memorial
description_short: North Memorial FCU is a credit union serving North Memorial Health employees with checking, savings, CDs, auto loans, and mobile banking in Minnesota.
description_long:
North Memorial Federal Credit Union (NMFCU) is a financial institution established to serve employees and members affiliated with North Memorial Health Care in Minnesota. As a credit union, it operates under federal oversight (NMLS #411091) with member deposits federally insured up to $250,000. The institution maintains two physical locations in the Minneapolis metropolitan area: Robbinsdale and Maple Grove, Minnesota.

North Memorial FCU offers core banking services including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), auto loans, VISA/EZ-CARD debit cards, online banking, and mobile banking with remote deposit capabilities. Current featured rates include auto loans as low as 4.09% APR, personal savings accounts with $5 minimum opening balance at 0.05% APY, and 5-year CDs at 2.75% APY (as of January 1, 2026). Members can access their accounts through online banking, a dedicated mobile app with remote check deposit, ATM access, and in-person service at two staffed locations.

As a credit union, North Memorial FCU distinguishes itself through membership-based banking, federally insured deposits, and direct service to North Memorial Health Care employees and their families. The institution provides extended hours on North Memorial Health payday Fridays (opening at 7 a.m.) and maintains four ATM locations including one in the North Memorial Medical Center atrium and one in Maple Grove Hospital for member convenience. The credit union model emphasizes member benefits and accessibility over profit maximization.

North Memorial FCU is best suited for North Memorial Health employees and their families seeking basic banking services with localized, personalized service. However, as a health system-affiliated credit union with limited geographic presence and no indication of competitive rates compared to larger financial institutions, it functions primarily as an employee benefit rather than a competitive option for general consumers.
services: Personal checking accounts with online and mobile banking
Certificate of Deposit (CD) products at 2.75% APY for 5-year terms
Auto loans with APR as low as 4.09%
Mobile banking app with remote deposit capture
Online banking portal with password recovery and account access
Four ATM locations with free member withdrawals
In-person banking at two physical branch locations
Drive-thru banking service at Maple Grove location
pros: Mobile deposit functionality available through dedicated app for convenient check deposits
Four ATM locations including in-hospital facilities (Robbinsdale and Maple Grove) for member access
Free ATM withdrawals at all NMFCU and partner ATM locations
Extended hours on North Memorial Health payday Fridays (opening at 7 a.m.)
Two physical branch locations with separate drive-thru access in Maple Grove
Federally insured member deposits up to $250,000 backed by U.S. Government
Low minimum account opening ($5 for personal savings)
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Robbinsdale and Maple Grove, Minnesota locations only
Membership appears restricted to North Memorial Health Care employees and affiliates
Savings rates (0.05% APY) are extremely low compared to online banks and other financial institutions
Audio response system noted as down for maintenance on website
No indication of online account opening or non-local member access options
best_for: North Memorial Health Care employees seeking convenient banking with employer-affiliated credit union
Hospital system workers wanting ATM access on-site at workplace or affiliated medical facilities
Individuals prioritizing local, personalized banking service over competitive interest rates
diagnosis: North Memorial FCU is best for North Memorial Health Care employees and family members who prioritize convenient, personalized local banking service and on-site ATM access over competitive interest rates. The main caveat is that this is primarily an employee benefit credit union with membership restrictions and minimal geographic reach—not a competitive option for general consumers seeking market-rate banking products.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: North Memorial — NCUA-insured credit union in ROBBINSDALE, MN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
